basicInfo.name: Nezha
basicInfo.flavor: When Nezha fully unleashes the power of her magical artifacts, she takes on a form with three heads and six arms, hence the moniker \"Monstrous Strength.\" However, perhaps due to finding this form grotesque even to herself, she rarely ever reveals it.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - Allies (Self, Ally with the Highest ATK)
 - Reduces skill cooldowns by 8s.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Single Enemy
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Magic Attack.

Skill 1.name: Flower Dance
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 175% of Magic Attack 1 time(s). (Damage increases by an amount equal to up to 50% of the target's lost HP.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 225% of Magic Attack.

Skill 2.name: Tidal Wave
Skill 2.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 260% of Magic Attack 1 time(s). (Damage increases by an amount equal to up to 50% of the target's lost HP.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 335% of Magic Attack.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Ignore Defense

Passive.name: Lotus's Protection
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity when HP falls to 50% or lower. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - Grants Crit Rate Boost. [Always Active]
 - Allies (Magic)
 - Grants Triple-Target Attack Damage Boost. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Self
 - Increases Effect: Crit Rate Boost to 33%.
 - Magic Allies
 - Increases Effect: Triple-Target Attack Damage by 33%
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - All Allies
 - Adds Effect: Grants a Barrier equal to 55% of the caster's Magic Attack upon using a skill 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Lee Jung, Yu Shin, Branze & Bransel, lotuses, various weapons
profile.dislikes: Sun Wukong, Mercure, black magic, ants
profile.story: When Nezha fully unleashes the power of her magical artifacts, she takes on a form with three heads and six arms, hence the moniker \"Monstrous Strength.\" However, perhaps due to finding this form grotesque even to herself, she rarely ever reveals it.

basicInfo.name: Nezha
basicInfo.flavor: Reborn through the power of magical artifacts, Nezha frequently caused trouble wherever she went due to her inability to properly control her powers. She was then eventually subdued by another great sage who took her in as a disciple and provided her with guidance and training.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - Allies (Self, Ally with the Highest ATK)
 - Reduces skill cooldowns by 8s.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Flower Dance
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 155% of Magic Attack 1 time(s). (Damage increases by an amount equal to up to 50% of the target's lost HP.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 155% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 235% of Magic Attack 1 time(s). (Damage increases by an amount equal to up to 50% of the target's lost HP.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 235% of Physical Attack.

basicInfo.name: Nezha
basicInfo.flavor: Though Nezha was born prematurely and was destined to die soon after birth, she was placed inside a lotus filled with powerful magical artifacts and was carried to full term for another ten months before being born again.
